At the bottom right of the mounting sheet, below the clipping, is a faded ink stamp with the lines:

elements.description: A single, yellowed newspaper clipping from 'The Washington Post'. It contains multiple columns of typed text with a main headline 'Priest Finds 'Whirring' Disc In Yard and Holds It for FBI'. There are no photographs, sketches, or diagrams within the clipping, only body text, pull quotes, and a stamp/label at the bottom right that reads 'THE WASHINGTON POST' with lines for 'PAGE' and 'DATE'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual element (a yellowed Washington Post newspaper clipping) and the absence of photographs or diagrams, but Description B adds specific headline text not mentioned in A, while A mentions a green number '3' not noted in B.
